{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet mehs pascht apbruxx-
rofimees / staigadami teem Isra-
ëta Behrneem Preekfchâ/teekams
mehs tohs effam eewaddtjufchi
uhß winno Weetu / bet muhfu
Behrnixi laid paleek stiprôß Pils-
fahtôß/ to Semmes Eedshiwota-
ju deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehs ne atgreesifimees uhß
muhfeem Nammeem/ teekams tee
Israëta Behrni irr dabbujschi ik-
weens sawu Jhpafchuunu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo mehs ne nemfim fa-
wu Jhpafchuunu winnâ Jarda-
nas Puﬀê/ un wehl tahtaki/ bet
muhfu Jhpafchuuns muhs nahk-
fees schai Jardanas Puﬀê/ prett
Rihteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Mohsus us
teem: Ja juhs scho Leetii ta grib-
bat darriht/ ja juhs gribbat ap-
bruxxotees preekfch to KUN-
GU us Karru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ikweens no jums / kas
apbruxxohfs irr / pahr to Jar-
danu grib eet preekfch to KUN-
GU / kamehr wixsch sawus Ge-
naidneekus sawâ Preekfchâ is-
dihs / un ta Semme preekfch to
KUNGU usivarreta irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pehz juhs warrat at-
pakkaß nahkt/ un buhfeet neno-
feedsgi preekfch to KUNGU/ un
preekfch Israëlu/ un fchi Semme
buhs jums par Jhpafchuunu
KUNGA Preekfchâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja juhs ta ne grib-
bat darriht / rangt / tad effat
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Uhstaifajt jums Pilsfah-
tus preekfch juhfeem Behrui-
neem/ un Laidarus preekfch juh-
feem tihkeem Lohpeem / un dar-
rajt/ kas no juhfas Muttes is-
gahjis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runnaja tee Gada
Behrni/ un tee Rubbena Behr-
ni us Mohsu/ un fazzija: Tawi
Kalpi darrihs / ittin ka manö
Kungs paweht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Muhfu Behrnixi / muhtaß
Seewas / muhfu gannant Pul-
ki/ un wiﬁi muhfo Lohpi palik-
tur eekfch Gileada Pilsfahteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tawi Kalpi no-ee
wiﬁi apbruxxoti ta KUNGU
Preekfchâ Karra/ ittin ka manö
Kungs runnajis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pawehleja Mohsu
winno deht Eeleasararn tan
Preesteram/ un Josuüm Nunnu
Dehlan/ un teem Tehwu Wir-
neekeem/ no tahin Israëta Behr-
nu Ziltim / un Mohsus fazzij-
us teem:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja tee Gada Behrni/ u-
tee Rubbena Behrni / ar jun-
pahr to Jardanu ees / ikkatre-
kas uhß Karru apbruxxoh-
ta KUNGA Preekfchâ / kad
Semme juhn Breekfchâ uh-
warreta irr/ tad buhs jums tee
Gileada Semini par Jhpafch-
mu doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja tee ar jums apbru-
oti ne no-ees / tad buhs tee
juh
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
